mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT cai.analysis_id, cai.sentence_id) FROM conversation_analysis_item cai INNER JOIN conversation_analysis ca ON cai.analysis_id = ca.analysis_id WHERE ca.user_id = #{userId} AND ca.status = 'success'

SELECT cai.problem_types AS problemType, COUNT(*) AS count FROM conversation_analysis_item cai INNER JOIN conversation_analysis ca ON cai.analysis_id = ca.analysis_id WHERE ca.user_id = #{userId} AND ca.status = 'success' GROUP BY cai.problem_types ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT cai.analysis_id, cai.sentence_id) FROM conversation_analysis_item cai INNER JOIN conversation_analysis ca ON cai.analysis_id = ca.analysis_id WHERE ca.user_id = #{userId} AND ca.status = 'success' AND cai.created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)

SELECT cai.id, cai.analysis_id, cai.sentence_id, cai.original_sentence, cai.problem_types, cai.error_point, cai.suggestion, cai.created_at FROM conversation_analysis_item cai INNER JOIN conversation_analysis ca ON cai.analysis_id = ca.analysis_id INNER JOIN (SELECT analysis_id, sentence_id, MAX(created_at) AS max_created FROM conversation_analysis_item GROUP BY analysis_id, sentence_id) t ON cai.analysis_id = t.analysis_id AND cai.sentence_id = t.sentence_id AND cai.created_at = t.max_created WHERE ca.user_id = #{userId} AND ca.status = 'success' ORDER BY t.max_created DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id, analysis_id, sentence_id, original_sentence, problem_types, error_point, suggestion, created_at FROM conversation_analysis_item WHERE analysis_id = #{analysisId} AND sentence_id = #{sentenceId} ORDER BY id ASC
